playercorpseforked:item-handbooktext-pla:
Helps to find your corpses. Server admins can also check the server-main.txt log for the exact coordinates of all corpses (uses in Creative)

Searches in 7x7 chunks around player (224x256x224 blocks by default)
corpsecompass-target-set: Target set on the last corpse
corpse-creation-failed: Corpse creation failed — your items were dropped at your death location. See server log for details.
